notes: ISO 27001:2022 Annex A control set. This SoA reflects the current implementation state as of Dec 2025.

controls.name: Policies for Information Security
controls.justification: Core governance requirement applicable to entire ISMS scope.
evidence_refs: Information Security Policy v3.2 (approved 2025-11-02, signed by CEO)
controls.notes: Annual review cycle set to November; next review due 2026-11.

controls.name: Access Control
controls.justification: Access management applies to all in-scope systems and data.
evidence_refs: Quarterly access review records (Q3 2025 completed, Q4 2025 in progress)
controls.notes: Service account review process being formalized; target completion 2026-Q1.

controls.name: Information Security Incident Management
controls.justification: Incident response required for SaaS operations supporting customers.
controls.notes: 24/7 on-call rotation in place; post-incident reviews logged in Jira.

controls.name: Screening
controls.justification: Background checks required for roles with production/data access.
controls.notes: Contractor screening aligned to employee policy since 2025-09.

controls.name: Information Security Awareness
controls.justification: Awareness training for all personnel in scope.
controls.notes: New hires complete training within 14 days; annual refresher each November.

controls.name: Physical Security Perimeters
controls.justification: Applies to London HQ office where support staff operate.
controls.notes: Only London HQ in scope; Berlin coworking excluded from ISMS.

controls.name: Privileged Access Rights
controls.justification: Privileged access governs production and admin environments.
evidence_refs: Azure AD PIM configuration for Global Admin and Azure Admin roles
controls.notes: Legacy DB shared admin accounts still present; PAM rollout planned Q1 2026.

controls.name: Secure Authentication
controls.justification: Strong authentication required for all user and admin access.
controls.notes: Two service accounts pending migration to managed identities by 2026-02.

controls.name: Management of Technical Vulnerabilities
controls.justification: Continuous vulnerability scanning and timely remediation are required.
evidence_refs: Patch SLA policy (Critical: 14 days; High: 30 days)
controls.notes: Exception approved for legacy billing server until 2026-03-31 due to vendor constraints.

controls.name: Information Backup
controls.justification: Backups for production data and configuration are required.
evidence_refs: AWS Backup job success logs (rolling 90 days)
controls.notes: Next restoration test scheduled 2026-02-15; scope includes database point-in-time recovery.

controls.name: Logging
controls.justification: Security logging and monitoring across in-scope systems.
evidence_refs: Retention config (currently 90 days for app logs)
controls.notes: Policy requires 180 days; application log retention uplift planned for Q1 2026. Two VPCs missing flow logs ingestion.

controls.name: Use of Cryptography
controls.justification: Encryption for data at rest and in transit.
evidence_refs: KMS CMK usage for PII databases
controls.notes: Certificate inventory maintained; expirations tracked with alerting.
